name: llm-wiki-claude
description: Turn Claude into the maintainer of a persistent, interlinked Obsidian-friendly markdown wiki. Implementation of Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as Claude Code skills + commands.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Five skills + slash commands for wiki bootstrap, ingest, query, lint, and per-page updates. Default vault at ~/Documents/obsidian/claude/.
